mapper.select: SELECT post_id, category, title, content, max_participants, participants, recruitment_status, date, location, post_status, created_at, updated_at, member_id FROM post WHERE post_status = true ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT post_id, category, title, content, max_participants, participants, recruitment_status, date, location, post_status, created_at, updated_at, member_id FROM post WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND post_status = true ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT post_id, category, title, content, max_participants, participants, recruitment_status, date, location, post_status, created_at, updated_at, member_id FROM post WHERE category = #{category} AND post_status = true ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT post_id, category, title, content, max_participants, participants, recruitment_status, date, location, post_status, created_at, updated_at, member_id FROM post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND post_status = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
